articles.title: Loop the Loopies!
articles.excerpt: We present Loopie, the most powerful looped Transformer to date. The Loopie series consists of two Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models: a 20B-parameter model with 2B active parameters and a 6Bparameter model with 0.6B active parameters. Looped Transformers have long faced a challenge: given an N-fold in
articles.summary: Loopie 提出迄今最强的循环 Transformer 系列（20B/6B MoE），通过 N 倍推理深度提升性能，解决循环 Transformer 长期面临的挑战。

articles.title: SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune
articles.excerpt: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. articles.title: Xiaomi-Robotics-1: Scaling Vision-Language-Action Models with over 100K Hours of Real-World Trajectories
articles.excerpt: We present Xiaomi-Robotics-1, a foundational vision-language-action (VLA) model capable of (1) following diverse language instructions to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in unseen environments out-of-the-box, and (2) efficiently adapting to novel downstream tasks with minimal fine-
articles.summary: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 是基础 VLA 模型，基于超 10 万小时真实世界轨迹训练，可直接执行多样化移动操作任务，并少量微调就能适应新任务。

articles.title: DeepSearch-World: Self-Distillation for Deep Search Agents in a Verifiable Environment
articles.excerpt: Training tool-use agents to improve from their own experience remains challenging, as supervised fine-tuning relies on fixed teacher-distilled trajectories, while sparse-reward reinforcement learning provides weak supervision for long-horizon interactions. We present DeepSearch-Evolve, a self-distil
articles.summary: DeepSearch-Evolve 提出自蒸馏方法，让工具使用智能体在可验证环境中从自身经验中学习，无需依赖固定教师轨迹或稀疏奖励，实现长程交互优化。

articles.title: EvolvingWorld: An Open-Schema Framework for Co-Evolving Role-Play Agents and World Model in Interactive Literary World
articles.excerpt: This paper introduces EvolvingWorld, a framework and benchmark for character and world co-evolution in interactive literary worlds. articles.summary: EvolvingWorld 提出角色与世界共同演化的开放框架与基准，突破静态角色模仿或孤立场景生成，实现交互式文学世界中角色与世界的动态演变。

articles.title: TimeLens2: Generalist Video Temporal Grounding with Multimodal LLMs
articles.excerpt: Video multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can describe what happens in a video, but rarely identify when the supporting evidence occurs. articles.summary: TimeLens2 研究通用视频时间定位，使用多模态 LLM 预测可变数量的证据区间，覆盖不同视频长度、领域和查询类型，解决「发生了什么」不含「何时发生」的局限。

articles.title: xHC: Expanded Hyper-Connections
articles.excerpt: Hyper-Connections (HC) expand the residual stream of Transformers into N parallel streams, providing a form of memory scaling beyond model width and depth. articles.title: Cura 1T: Specialized Model for Agentic Healthcare

articles.summary: Cura 1T 是面向医疗场景的专用 LLM，覆盖患者咨询、图文临床推理、交互诊断和电子健康记录处理，填补医疗领域高要求多任务统一模型的空白。

articles.title: HOMIE: Human-object Centric Video Personalization via Multimodal Intelligent Enchancement
articles.excerpt: Human-object centric video personalization (HOCVP) is a core task within subject-driven video generation. However, existing methods suffer from two key limitations. articles.summary: HOMIE 针对人物-物体中心视频个性化，通过多模态智能增强在保持高主体保真度和运动可控性间取得平衡，提升主体驱动视频生成质量。

articles.title: On-Policy Delta Distillation

articles.summary: On-Policy Delta Distillation 研究在线蒸馏在 RL 中的基本原理，通过教师模型的 token 级监督替代奖励模型约束，为 LLM 对齐训练提供新视角。

articles.title: RynnBrain 1.1: Towards More Capable and Generalizable Embodied Foundation Model
articles.excerpt: We present RynnBrain 1.1, a family of embodied foundation models spanning 2B, 9B, and 122B-A10B scales. articles.summary: RynnBrain 1.1 系列具身基础模型（2B/9B/122B-A10B）采用统一时空与物理框架，支持感知、空间推理、定位和规划，相较 1.0 版本泛化能力显著提升。

articles.title: Apple-π: Benchmarking Thinking with Video Towards Law-Grounded Physical Intelligence

articles.excerpt: Code review helps maintain software quality before code integration, but it also imposes a substantial workload on human reviewers. articles.summary: ReflectWorld-MM 是面向开放视频流的实体导向多模态记忆系统，使智能体持续观看、记忆并基于累积经验推理，克服现有记忆系统的局限性。

articles.excerpt: 日本德仁天皇目前仅有三位皇位继承人，分别是他的弟弟及弟弟的儿子，以及他90岁的叔父。对皇位继承法的修正旨在维系仅允许男性继承皇位的做法，尽管七成受访民众支持有一位女性天皇。

articles.title: “再见 我的AI恋人”: 中国新规上路 虚拟爱情下线
